message:
fix(web): make featured prompt copy optional

Why:
- The landing page no longer needs toast-based copy feedback in this flow.
- Featured prompts should render even when a copy handler is not wired.

Changes:
- Remove the toast-driven onPromptCopy usage from the landing page.
- Make onPromptCopy optional in FeaturedPromptsSection and guard invocation.

Result:
- Landing page renders without unused copy side-effects.
- Featured prompt cards stay compatible with callers that do provide copy handlers.
